postInstallEvidenceIntake.quickProofReceipt:
JooPark Post-Install Quick Proof Receipt
Status: proof_complete
Repo: biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects
Default branch: main
Proof complete: true
Fields complete: 6/6
Quick proof steps: 4

4-step proof checklist:
1. remote_file_parity: run node scripts/check-remote-workflow-files.mjs --repo biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects --write; expect remoteWorkflowFilesReady=true; paste into remote_parity_proof
2. actions_visibility: run gh workflow list --repo biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects --all --json name,path,state,id; expect remoteWorkflowVisibilityReady=true; paste into actions_visibility_proof
3. dispatch_readiness: run node scripts/plan-publish-dispatch.mjs --live --repo biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects; expect allDispatchReady=true; paste into dispatch_readiness_proof
4. handoff_verifier: run node scripts/verify-launch-handoff.mjs --repo biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects --write --markdown; expect safeToDispatch=true before gh workflow run; paste into handoff_verifier_proof

Mapped proof fields:
1. remote_file_parity -> remote_parity_proof: proof_ready; completed=true; current=remoteWorkflowFilesReady=true; filesReady=2/2; missing=0; mismatch=0; expected=remoteWorkflowFilesReady=true and every workflow file has remoteExists=true and remoteMatchesTemplate=true.
2. actions_visibility -> actions_visibility_proof: proof_ready; completed=true; current=remoteWorkflowVisibilityReady=true; expected=remoteWorkflowVisibilityReady=true and GitHub Actions lists both workflow files.
3. dispatch_readiness -> dispatch_readiness_proof: proof_ready; completed=true; current=dispatchReady=true; driftDispatchReady=true; allDispatchReady=true; expected=dispatchReady=true, driftDispatchReady=true, and allDispatchReady=true.
4. handoff_verifier -> handoff_verifier_proof: proof_ready; completed=true; current=safeToDispatch=true; allDispatchReady=true; expected=verify-launch-handoff reports safeToDispatch=true before gh workflow run.

Six evidence fields remain required:
- Pages workflow commit: [paste commit URL or SHA for .github/workflows/joopark-pages.yml on the default branch]
- Drift Watch workflow commit: [paste commit URL or SHA for .github/workflows/joopark-drift-watch.yml on the default branch]
- Remote parity proof: [paste generatedAt plus remoteWorkflowFilesReady=true from data/remote-workflow-file-check.json]
- Actions visibility proof: [paste gh workflow list output showing both workflow paths visible]
- Dispatch readiness proof: [paste generatedAt plus dispatchReady=true, driftDispatchReady=true, and allDispatchReady=true]
- Handoff verifier proof: [paste verify-launch-handoff status plus safeToDispatch=true before gh workflow run]

Stop condition: do not run gh workflow run, archive proof, or claim launch until all six post-install evidence fields are filled and verify-launch-handoff reports safeToDispatch=true.

closeoutPacket.text:
External claim closeout packet:
- status=blocked_external_claim; ready=false; repo=biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects
- missingRequirements=Public launch proof; External completion claim

Closeout steps:
1. Install workflows on the default branch: Confirm the Pages and Drift Watch workflow files exist on the repository default branch before any workflow_dispatch run. Command: gh auth refresh -h github.com -s workflow
2. Verify default branch workflow_dispatch visibility: Confirm GitHub Actions lists the manual workflows and the local handoff verifier still reports safeToDispatch=false until evidence is complete. Command: node scripts/check-remote-workflow-files.mjs --repo biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects --write
3. Refresh dispatch plan after installation: Regenerate the live dispatch plan and keep gh workflow run commands withheld unless allDispatchReady=true. Command: node scripts/plan-publish-dispatch.mjs --live --repo biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects
4. Capture workflow run summary proof: After safe dispatch, capture the GitHub Actions workflow run summary, Pages URL, and release receipt links instead of relying on logs alone. Command: node scripts/verify-launch-handoff.mjs --repo biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects --write --markdown
5. Archive the Release-note archive claim: Only archive the release-note/public archive claim after live publish evidence is fresh and readyForExternalClaim=true. Command: node scripts/capture-publish-evidence.mjs --live --repo biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects --write

Required proof fields:
- Remote workflow files: current=remoteWorkflowFilesReady=true; expected=remoteWorkflowFilesReady=true
- Workflow Actions visibility: current=remoteWorkflowVisibilityReady=true; expected=remoteWorkflowVisibilityReady=true
- Dispatch readiness: current=allDispatchReady=true; expected=allDispatchReady=true
- Workflow run summary: current=postPublishEvidenceReady=false; expected=workflow run summary link captured and postPublishEvidenceReady=true
- Launch packet external claim: current=launchPacketReadyForExternalClaim=false; expected=launchPacketReadyForExternalClaim=true
- Final external claim: current=readyForExternalClaim=false; expected=readyForExternalClaim=true

Allowed claim after proof:
- readyForExternalClaim=true
- public launch complete
- post public launch copy archived with workflow run summary and release-note proof

Forbidden until proof:
- readyForExternalClaim=true while any required proof field is false
- public launch complete before live Pages and workflow summary proof
- Release-note archive claim before postPublishEvidenceReady=true

External benchmark notes:
- GitHub manual dispatch requires a default branch workflow_dispatch workflow and write access.
- GitHub job summaries should carry the workflow run summary so readers do not need to inspect logs.
- GitHub Releases support release notes and archive links for public release context.
